title: Asana
description: Your assigned Asana tasks, search tasks, and look up a task by gid.

title: BambooHR
description: Look up people in the BambooHR employee directory.

title: Bitbucket
description: Open pull requests in your Bitbucket Cloud repository.

title: Box
description: Browse your Box files and search Box by keyword.

title: Office Cafes
description: Cafes near your office via OpenStreetMap.

title: ClickUp
description: Your ClickUp tasks from the org default list; look up a task by id.

title: Confluence (Cloud)
description: Search Confluence pages and look them up by space (Atlassian Cloud).

title: Dropbox
description: Browse and search files in your Dropbox.

title: Figma
description: My recent Figma files.

title: Freshdesk Tickets
description: Browse and search Freshdesk support tickets.

title: Google Calendar
description: Show upcoming events on your primary calendar, or search your calendar by keyword.

title: Google Drive
description: Recent files and search across your Google Drive.

title: GitHub
description: Search pull requests + issues, or look up by owner/repo#N.

title: GitLab Merge Requests
description: Your open GitLab merge requests; search and look up by !iid.

title: Gmail
description: Search Gmail conversations using Gmail's standard search operators (from:, subject:, is:unread, newer_than:, has:attachment, ...).

title: HubSpot CRM
description: Search HubSpot companies and contacts (official HubSpot Remote MCP).

title: Active Incidents
description: PagerDuty + Datadog + ServiceNow incidents in one list.

title: Intercom
description: Search Intercom conversations and look one up by id (open conversations by default).

title: Jira Work
description: Search Jira issues, browse sprints, and look up tickets by key.

title: Jira Work (Cloud)
description: Search Jira issues, browse sprints, and look up tickets by key (Atlassian Cloud).

title: Linear
description: Search Linear issues across your teams, and look up issues by identifier.

title: Monday
description: Items from a monday.com board: search, look up by board id, browse.

title: New Relic
description: Run an NRQL query against your New Relic account, or ask in plain English.

title: Notion
description: Search Notion pages and databases across your workspace.

title: OneDrive
description: Browse and search files in your OneDrive (Microsoft Graph).

title: Outlook
description: Search Outlook mail.

title: Pipedrive
description: My open deals, deal search, and people in Pipedrive CRM.

title: Salesforce
description: Search Salesforce accounts by name or owner, and look up an account by record Id.

title: SharePoint
description: Search SharePoint files, folders, and sites (Microsoft Work IQ).

title: Slack
description: Search Slack messages across channels you belong to.

title: Splunk
description: Run a Splunk search (SPL) and browse the matching events.

title: Stripe
description: Recent Stripe customers (official Stripe Remote MCP).

title: My Team
description: List your direct reports or peers under your manager.

title: Microsoft Teams
description: Recent Teams chats and messages from a pinned chat or channel.

title: Trello
description: Your Trello cards, plus lists and boards (self-hosted Trello MCP).

title: Workday
description: Search Workday workers (requires custom Workday MCP setup).

title: Zendesk Support
description: Search Zendesk support tickets, look up a ticket by number, and find users.
